  • Overview
  • Tree
  • Index
  • Search
  • Help
Select Theme

    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    AudioManager
    Main manager used to save and control audios.
    AudioPlay
    Class used to play audio of the Play
    Ball
    Ball is an Enemy that represents a simple floating ball that continuously chase the Player.
    Controller
    Controller used to set the game model, the window view and all the controls and commands for the game while also starting the game loop and manage the timers
    ControlRoom
    ControlRoom is basically an Interactable that represents an entrance that the Player need have a full pass to get access into and winning the game.
    DataManager
    Used to save and load files in the data folder
    Detectable
    Detectable is a type of Entity that other than having the normal hitbox, it also has the dtcbox (detectbox), used to check if certain Entity is within it's dtcbox.
    Elevator
    Level used as transition between Rooms acting like an Elevator that can access different floors for different rooms.
    Enemy
    Enemy is a type of Entity that other than having the normal hitbox, it has also the atkbox (attackbox), used to check if certain Entity is within it's atkbox and to destroy/kill it (actions helped by the manager).
    EnemyManager
    Main manager used for the enemies to update their position and help destroying/kill entities on their range.
    Entity
    Class used by all the entities which contains their original position (x, y) and their hitbox
    EntityFactory
    Factory used for the creation of the entities
    EntityFactory.EntityTypes
    Types of entity
    EntityManager
    Manage the main 3 entities manager, which is Enemy, Lift and Interactables, with updates and creation of the entities.
    FactoryComponents
    Factory used for the creation/distribution of components for the panels.
    Furniture
    Furnitures is an Interactable used to search the pass inside, waiting for the percentage gets to 0 before getting the item inside (action helped by the manager) and deactivate.
    Furniture.FurnitureTypes
    Types of Furniture (name, width, height, offsetY, check percent)
    Game
    Main game model used to manage the profiles (up to 8), the leaderboard and starting/ending/restarting the Play.
    Interactable
    Detectable entity that allows an additional interactions with the Player.
    InteractableManager
    Main manager of the interactables entities, used to help with the interactions between Interactable (closer to the Player) and Player.
    JImpossibleMission
    JIMPOSSIBLE MISSION
    Leaderboard
     
    Level
    Level is a place that is loaded by a txt file (getting the lvData and giving to the EntityManager) where Player can traverse and Entity can stay (managed by EntityManager).
    LevelManager
    Main manager of the levels that saves them, create the map (with the distribution of the items) and handles the transition and commands of the Player.
    Lift
    Entity that represents a Lift platform for the Player to stand on and control.
    LiftManager
    Main manager for the lifts and their floors, helping with their collisions, updates their positions and command given by the Player.
    LoadImage
    Class used to load single or group of images.
    MapReader
    Class used to help entities to read the map and it's collisions.
    MenuPanel
    Panel to show the main menu (access to Play, Profile, Settings and exiting the game)
    Navigator
    Class used to communicate with Window to switch Panel
    Navigator.ScreenStates
    Types of screen to show
    Panel
    Main class used for the panels
    Play
    Play is basically the current match of the game, saving it's states, creating the entities and the levels needed and updating it's content.
    Play.PlayState
    States of the current play
    Player
    The entity that represents the Player and can be controlled it's movement and it's interaction by the user.
    Player.PlayerActions
    Player states
    PlayPanel
    Panel to show the Play (rendering the sprites and playing the audios depending the situation of the Play)
    Profile
    Basically the profile of the user that can be saved as a file and contains the name, the avatar (file image), plays, victories, loses and levels accumulated for each 5000 points.
    ProfilePanel
    Panel to shows 8 profiles and their stats
    RecordSave
    RecordSave is basically the record that is saved by the Leaderboard, it contains the ID (which is the nickname of the current Profile, only the first 5 characters in caps) and the points accumulated through a match in Play.
    RenderPlay
    Class used to render sprites of the Play
    ResultPanel
    Panel used to show the result of the Play match
    Robot
    Robot is an Enemy that represents a simple grounded robot that can have different behavior upon the creation (depending also if it has the range attack).
    Robot.RobotAction
     
    Room
    Level that contains the passes to win the game and enemies to avoid.
    ScoreManager
    ScoreManager is used mostly to get information of how many points it gain (separated in different types: passes for the entities, passes for ControlRoom, time and total)
    SettingsPanel
    Panel used to get access to the settings (mute/play the sounds and the soundtrack of the menu, and resetting the leaderboard)
    SpritesCollection
    Main class that is used to save all the sprites for the game
    Terminal
    Terminal is an Interactable that used to interupt the Play temporarily to get access to it's screen
    TerminalPanel
    Panel used to show the Terminal screen (access on passes for resetting the lifts and temporarily disable the enemies)
    Window
    Main frame of the game where creates the Navigator (used to switch Panel), the main Panels and helps giving them commands.
